g.title: ExecuteUbergraph_BP_DiscordConsole__443
g.text: SourceString = Open browser to join our Discord Server
SourceString = By pressing YES you will be taken to an external browser and be prompted to join our Discord Server. Do you want to proceed?

g.title: ExecuteUbergraph_BP_DiscordConsole__1157
g.text: SourceString = Claim your 5000 Credits reward at any Miner Community terminal!
